First, release compliance certificate: (release_compliance_certificate shift_candidate_alpha compliance_certificate_alpha)

Seventh, confirm candidate preparedness for origin: (confirm_candidate_preparedness origin_availability_alpha route_task_profile_alpha)

Ninth, unload origin payload: (unload_origin_payload origin_availability_alpha origin_node_alpha route_task_profile_alpha cargo_payload_alpha)
